# Who Owns Atlanta

> A public tool for exploring property ownership in Atlanta, covering 600,000+ parcels across Fulton and DeKalb counties. Tax records list LLCs; this site connects those dots — clustering related entities that share addresses, registered agents, or other identifiers so shell companies appear together rather than separately.

Built from publicly available county tax records. Not affiliated with any government agency.

## What to index

- [About](https://who-owns-atlanta.org/about/) — project description, methodology summary, data sources
- [FAQ](https://who-owns-atlanta.org/faq/) — common questions about data freshness, coverage gaps, and methodology
- [Methodology](https://who-owns-atlanta.org/methodology/) — detailed explanation of how ownership clustering works

## What not to index

The bulk of the site (~1.3GB) is machine-generated pages for individual property owners, registered agents, shared addresses, and parcels. Please do not crawl or index these. See robots.txt.

## Contact

Questions or corrections: open an issue at https://github.com/who-owns-atlanta (repository forthcoming)
